name: Cedric the Entertainer
bio: Cedric Antonio Kyles, known as Cedric the Entertainer, is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and television host who broke through hosting BETs ComicView and Def Comedy Jam in the mid-1990s. He became one of The Original Kings of Comedy alongside Steve Harvey, Bernie Mac, and D.L. Hughley, and is known for his big-stage, charismatic observational style. He later starred in Barbershop, voiced roles in the Madagascar and Ice Age films, and headlined the CBS sitcom The Neighborhood.

timeline.ev: Co-stars on The Steve Harvey Show
Featured in The Original Kings of Comedy
Receives a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame

accolades: One of The Original Kings of Comedy (2000)
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame (2019)
Honorary doctorate from Lincoln University of Missouri (2015)
